1 Within Plot Level

Ben J. Rivera

2023-01-31

Okay, the goal of this section is all about understanding how a much plant variation there can be within a 2x2 m quadrat. The goal is to compare the focal communities to their immediate surroundings. If they are tightly conserved, that would suggest a niche-y assembly which will then lead to an examination of which environmental variables matter. If no environmental variables are good, then we either did not measure the correct ones or we can blame spatial auto-correlation (See: 3_WithinSite/BetweenPointsLevel). If it is spatial auto-correlation and/or random, then we are thinking about neutral. I expect the relative importance of the environemnt to vary with environmental stress.

Species Composition

Ten Mile

This is a section for analyzing data only from ten mile. I will repeat same process for each location.

#I make unique identifiers for each plot
TeMi_Names<- colnames(TeMi_Cover)
TeMi_Names<-gsub('.{1}$', '', TeMi_Names)
TeMi_Names<-unique(gsub('TeMi.', '', TeMi_Names))
TeMi_Diss<-data.frame(Plot = rep("", length(TeMi_Names)), Dissimilarity= rep(0, length(TeMi_Names)))


for (i in 1:length(TeMi_Names)) {
  Temp_Cover<-TeMi_Cover %>% select(starts_with(paste0("TeMi.", TeMi_Names[i])))
  #Temp_Cover<- cbind(Temp_Cover[1], rowSums(Temp_Cover[2:5], na.rm = TRUE)/4)
  Temp_Diss<-vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE)
  Temp_Av_Dis<-sum(as.matrix(Temp_Diss)[,1])/4
  TeMi_Diss$Plot[i]<- TeMi_Names[i]
  TeMi_Diss$Dissimilarity[i]<- ifelse(is.na(Temp_Av_Dis) == TRUE, 0, ifelse(Temp_Av_Dis == "NaN", 0, Temp_Av_Dis))

}
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): missing values in results
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): missing values in results
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): missing values in results
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): missing values in results
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
densityplot(TeMi_Diss$Dissimilarity)

TeMi_Diss$Plot<- as.numeric(TeMi_Diss$Plot)

TeMi_Diss<-merge(TeMi_Diss, TeMi_RelCords)

TeMi_Diss<-merge(TeMi_Diss, subset(DuneEnv_scaled, Site == "TeMi"))


TeMi_pcor<- TeMi_Diss %>%
  select(-c(Site, Plot, Aspect, Date, Collectors, dry_weight, Notes))%>%
  as.matrix()%>%
  cor.mtest(use =  "complete")

TeMi_Diss %>%
  select(-c(Site, Plot, Aspect, Date, Collectors, dry_weight, Notes))%>%
  as.matrix()%>%
  cor(use =  "complete")%>%
  corrplot( type = "upper", order = "hclust",  tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45, p.mat = TeMi_pcor$p)

Graphs and models

Distance

densityplot(TeMi_Diss$X)

densityplot(TeMi_Diss$Y)

densityplot(TeMi_Diss$Z)

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ X, data = TeMi_Diss)) # Distance from waterline not sig
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ X, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.50365 -0.10430  0.00164  0.11383  0.48919 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.4481275  0.0956314   4.686 3.71e-05 ***
## X           0.0007391  0.0019894   0.372    0.712    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2191 on 37 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.003717,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.02321 
## F-statistic: 0.138 on 1 and 37 DF,  p-value: 0.7124
ggplot(aes(x = X, y = Dissimilarity), data = TeMi_Diss)+
  geom_point()+
  labs(x = "X-Coordinate", y = "Compositional Dissimilarity", title = "Ten-Mile (North)")

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Y, data = TeMi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Y, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.52103 -0.10911 -0.02069  0.11974  0.50260 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.4366741  0.0689841   6.330 2.25e-07 ***
## Y           0.0005980  0.0007996   0.748    0.459    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2179 on 37 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.01489,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.01173 
## F-statistic: 0.5593 on 1 and 37 DF,  p-value: 0.4593
ggplot(aes(x = Y, y = Dissimilarity), data = TeMi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Z, data = TeMi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Z, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max

## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)

## Z           0.007438   0.032184   0.231 0.818501    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2194 on 37 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.001442,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.02555 
## F-statistic: 0.05341 on 1 and 37 DF,  p-value: 0.8185
ggplot(aes(x = Z, y = Dissimilarity), data = TeMi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ X+Y+Z, data = TeMi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ X + Y + Z, data = TeMi_Diss)

## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max

## F-statistic: 0.2409 on 3 and 35 DF,  p-value: 0.8672

Environmental

densityplot(TeMi_Diss$SoilTemp)

densityplot(TeMi_Diss$SoilMoist)

densityplot(TeMi_Diss$Slope)

densityplot(TeMi_Diss$pH)

densityplot(TeMi_Diss$cond_us.cm)

densityplot(TeMi_Diss$salinity_ppt)

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp+SoilMoist+Slope+Aspect+pH, data = TeMi_Diss))

## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + 
##     pH, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.44742 -0.07485  0.04279  0.11765  0.41705 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)  3.299387   2.568834   1.284   0.2099  
## SoilTemp     0.083259   0.042761   1.947   0.0620 .
## SoilMoist    0.007286   0.045226   0.161   0.8732  
## Slope        0.005069   0.005600   0.905   0.3734  
## AspectN      0.056043   0.124394   0.451   0.6559  
## AspectNE     0.108816   0.142961   0.761   0.4532  
## AspectNW     0.017896   0.188791   0.095   0.9252  
## AspectS     -0.043995   0.132690  -0.332   0.7428  
## AspectSE     0.295925   0.163518   1.810   0.0815 .
## AspectSW     0.201576   0.195685   1.030   0.3121  
## AspectW      0.026679   0.155897   0.171   0.8654  
## pH          -0.318728   0.281098  -1.134   0.2668  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2197 on 27 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2688, Adjusted R-squared:  -0.02909 
## F-statistic: 0.9024 on 11 and 27 DF,  p-value: 0.5506
summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp, data = TeMi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.51982 -0.09517 -0.02008  0.10663  0.41207 
## 
## Coefficients:

## SoilTemp     0.04852    0.03475   1.396    0.171

## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.214 on 37 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.05006,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.02438 
## F-statistic:  1.95 on 1 and 37 DF,  p-value: 0.1709
ggplot(aes(x = SoilTemp, y = Dissimilarity), data = TeMi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilMoist, data = TeMi_Diss))

ggplot(aes(x = Slope, y = Dissimilarity), data = TeMi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Aspect, data = TeMi_Diss))

## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Aspect, data = TeMi_Diss)

ggplot(aes(x = Aspect, y = Dissimilarity), data = TeMi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

######## INTERESTING! ######
summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ pH, data = TeMi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ pH, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.48768 -0.10482  0.00446  0.11100  0.51806 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)  1.18564    2.10841   0.562    0.577
## pH          -0.07661    0.22927  -0.334    0.740
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2192 on 37 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.003009,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.02394 
## F-statistic: 0.1117 on 1 and 37 DF,  p-value: 0.7401
ggplot(aes(x = pH, y = Dissimilarity), data = TeMi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ cond_us.cm, data = TeMi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ cond_us.cm, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.47020 -0.11401 -0.01166  0.14063  0.37999 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.6597855  0.0827519   7.973 1.49e-09 ***
## cond_us.cm  -0.0002562  0.0001090  -2.351   0.0242 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2048 on 37 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1299, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1064 
## F-statistic: 5.526 on 1 and 37 DF,  p-value: 0.02418
ggplot(aes(x = cond_us.cm, y = Dissimilarity), data = TeMi_Diss)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ salinity_ppt, data = TeMi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ salinity_ppt, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.47923 -0.11458 -0.00829  0.13102  0.38705 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   0.63592    0.07958   7.991 1.41e-09 ***
## salinity_ppt -0.59806    0.27958  -2.139   0.0391 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2071 on 37 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1101, Adjusted R-squared:  0.08601 
## F-statistic: 4.576 on 1 and 37 DF,  p-value: 0.03909
ggplot(aes(x = salinity_ppt, y = Dissimilarity), data = TeMi_Diss)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

#### Combined

cor.test(x = TeMi_Diss$X, y = TeMi_Diss$salinity_ppt, method = "pearson")
## 
##  Pearson's product-moment correlation
## 
## data:  TeMi_Diss$X and TeMi_Diss$salinity_ppt
## t = -3.9617, df = 37, p-value = 0.0003263
## alternative hypothesis: true correlation is not equal to 0
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##  -0.7347511 -0.2781298
## sample estimates:
##        cor 
## -0.5457544
ggplot(aes(x = X, y = salinity_ppt), data = TeMi_Diss)+ #Weird that X isn't correlated with dissim
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

mod.x.temi<-lm(Dissimilarity ~ salinity_ppt*X, data = TeMi_Diss)
summary(mod.x.temi) #WHAT!?!?!
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ salinity_ppt * X, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.44680 -0.08725 -0.00999  0.10242  0.40148 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                 Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)     0.233019   0.279934   0.832   0.4108  
## salinity_ppt    1.007856   0.822409   1.225   0.2286  
## X               0.009041   0.005210   1.735   0.0915 .
## salinity_ppt:X -0.039978   0.017115  -2.336   0.0254 *
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1957 on 35 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2479, Adjusted R-squared:  0.1834 
## F-statistic: 3.845 on 3 and 35 DF,  p-value: 0.01768
interact_plot(mod.x.temi, pred = X, modx = salinity_ppt)

Negligible effects

TeMi.mod.1<- lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X + Z + pH, data = TeMi_Diss)
summary(TeMi.mod.1)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + 
##     X + Z + pH, data = TeMi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.46820 -0.08120  0.04277  0.12199  0.36691 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)  2.695694   3.060093   0.881   0.3868  
## SoilTemp     0.088066   0.045154   1.950   0.0624 .
## SoilMoist    0.013885   0.049841   0.279   0.7829  
## Slope        0.004875   0.005777   0.844   0.4068  
## AspectN      0.049005   0.130136   0.377   0.7097  
## AspectNE     0.089118   0.150427   0.592   0.5589  
## AspectNW     0.046684   0.199363   0.234   0.8168  
## AspectS     -0.052685   0.141462  -0.372   0.7127  
## AspectSE     0.296035   0.169731   1.744   0.0934 .
## AspectSW     0.204018   0.201709   1.011   0.3215  
## AspectW      0.052063   0.169360   0.307   0.7611  
## X            0.001701   0.002833   0.600   0.5536  
## Z           -0.005324   0.039920  -0.133   0.8950  
## pH          -0.258973   0.323818  -0.800   0.4314  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2264 on 25 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2816, Adjusted R-squared:  -0.09202 
## F-statistic: 0.7537 on 13 and 25 DF,  p-value: 0.6972
TeMi.Null.1 <- lm(Dissimilarity ~ 1, data = TeMi_Diss)
anova(TeMi.mod.1, TeMi.Null.1)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Model 1: Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X + Z + 
##     pH
## Model 2: Dissimilarity ~ 1
##   Res.Df    RSS  Df Sum of Sq      F Pr(>F)
## 1     25 1.2809                            
## 2     38 1.7830 -13  -0.50202 0.7537 0.6972
TeMi.pre.1<- predictions(TeMi.mod.1)

TeMi.cmp<- avg_comparisons(TeMi.mod.1,  variables =  list(SoilTemp = "minmax", SoilMoist = "minmax", Slope = "minmax", Aspect = "pairwise", X = "minmax", Z = "minmax", pH = "minmax"), conf_level = 0.90, type = "response")


TeMi.cmp<-TeMi.cmp %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  summarise_all(.funs = mean)
## Warning: There were 7 warnings in `summarise()`.
## The first warning was:
## ℹ In argument: `contrast = (new("standardGeneric", .Data = function (x, ...)
##   ...`.
## ℹ In group 1: `term = "Aspect"`.
## Caused by warning in `mean.default()`:
## ! argument is not numeric or logical: returning NA
## ℹ Run `dplyr::last_dplyr_warnings()` to see the 6 remaining warnings.
ggplot(TeMi.cmp, aes(x = estimate,
                 xmin = conf.low,
                 xmax = conf.high, 
                 y = term)) +
     annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1.5)+
  geom_errorbarh() + 
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic()
## Warning: Using the `size` aesthetic with geom_path was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use the `linewidth` aesthetic instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

Zmudowski

#I make unique identifiers for each plot
Zmud_Names<- colnames(Zmud_Cover)
Zmud_Names<-gsub('.{1}$', '', Zmud_Names)
Zmud_Names<-unique(gsub('Zmud.', '', Zmud_Names))
Zmud_Diss<-data.frame(Plot = rep("", length(Zmud_Names)), Dissimilarity= rep(0, length(Zmud_Names)))


for (i in 1:length(Zmud_Names)) {
  Temp_Cover<-Zmud_Cover %>% select(starts_with(paste0("Zmud.", Zmud_Names[i])))
  #Temp_Cover<- cbind(Temp_Cover[1], rowSums(Temp_Cover[2:5], na.rm = TRUE)/4)
  Temp_Diss<-vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE)
  Temp_Av_Dis<-sum(as.matrix(Temp_Diss)[,1])/4
  Zmud_Diss$Plot[i]<- Zmud_Names[i]
  Zmud_Diss$Dissimilarity[i]<- ifelse(is.na(Temp_Av_Dis) == TRUE, 0, ifelse(Temp_Av_Dis == "NaN", 0, Temp_Av_Dis))

}
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): missing values in results
densityplot(Zmud_Diss$Dissimilarity)

Zmud_Diss$Plot<- as.numeric(Zmud_Diss$Plot)

Zmud_Diss<-merge(Zmud_Diss, Zmud_RelCords)


Zmud_Diss<-merge(Zmud_Diss, subset(DuneEnv_scaled, Site == "Zmud"))

Zmud_pcor<- Zmud_Diss %>%
  select(-c(Site, Plot, Aspect, Date, Collectors, dry_weight, Notes, pH, cond_us.cm, salinity_ppt))%>%
  as.matrix()%>%
  cor.mtest(use =  "complete")

Zmud_Diss %>%
  select(-c(Site, Plot, Aspect, Date, Collectors, dry_weight, Notes, pH, cond_us.cm, salinity_ppt))%>%
  as.matrix()%>%
  cor(use =  "complete") %>%
  corrplot(type = "upper", order = "hclust", tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45, p.mat = Zmud_pcor$p)

Graphs and models

Distance

densityplot(Zmud_Diss$X)

densityplot(Zmud_Diss$Y)

densityplot(Zmud_Diss$Z)

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ X, data = Zmud_Diss)) # Distance from waterline SIG HERE!
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ X, data = Zmud_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.29045 -0.09714 -0.00685  0.07688  0.42712 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.279012   0.047011   5.935 5.35e-07 ***
## X           0.002281   0.001055   2.163   0.0364 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1555 on 41 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1024, Adjusted R-squared:  0.08055 
## F-statistic:  4.68 on 1 and 41 DF,  p-value: 0.0364
ggplot(aes(x = X, y = Dissimilarity), data = Zmud_Diss)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")+
  labs(x = "X-Coordinate", y = "Compositional Dissimilarity", title = "Zmudowski (middle)")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

 summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Y, data = Zmud_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Y, data = Zmud_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.34757 -0.10733  0.01730  0.07731  0.47241 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.4207881  0.0474042   8.877 4.29e-11 ***
## Y           -0.0006473  0.0004866  -1.330    0.191    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1608 on 41 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.04137,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.01799 
## F-statistic:  1.77 on 1 and 41 DF,  p-value: 0.1908
ggplot(aes(x = Y, y = Dissimilarity), data = Zmud_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Z, data = Zmud_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Z, data = Zmud_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.37468 -0.10186  0.01237  0.08918  0.42056 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.40072    0.05106   7.848 1.07e-09 ***
## Z           -0.01023    0.01345  -0.760    0.451    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.163 on 41 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.0139, Adjusted R-squared:  -0.01015 
## F-statistic: 0.578 on 1 and 41 DF,  p-value: 0.4514
ggplot(aes(x = Z, y = Dissimilarity), data = Zmud_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ X*Y*Z, data = Zmud_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ X * Y * Z, data = Zmud_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.29185 -0.10393 -0.00711  0.08695  0.40144 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)  3.340e-01  1.513e-01   2.208   0.0339 *
## X            2.698e-03  5.264e-03   0.513   0.6115  
## Y           -7.589e-04  1.721e-03  -0.441   0.6619  
## Z            2.452e-02  5.702e-02   0.430   0.6698  
## X:Y          1.397e-05  4.734e-05   0.295   0.7697  
## X:Z         -6.088e-04  1.761e-03  -0.346   0.7316  
## Y:Z         -9.026e-05  5.400e-04  -0.167   0.8682  
## X:Y:Z       -3.951e-06  1.594e-05  -0.248   0.8057  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1598 on 35 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1912, Adjusted R-squared:  0.02944 
## F-statistic: 1.182 on 7 and 35 DF,  p-value: 0.3381

Environmental

densityplot(Zmud_Diss$SoilTemp)

densityplot(Zmud_Diss$SoilMoist)

densityplot(Zmud_Diss$Slope)

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp+SoilMoist+Slope+Aspect, data = Zmud_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect, 
##     data = Zmud_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.32694 -0.09430 -0.01110  0.05693  0.35093 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)   
## (Intercept)  0.302844   0.109728   2.760  0.00936 **
## SoilTemp     0.049177   0.027979   1.758  0.08808 . 
## SoilMoist   -0.023532   0.027859  -0.845  0.40438   
## Slope        0.000695   0.003040   0.229  0.82055   
## AspectN      0.151999   0.110299   1.378  0.17746   
## AspectNE    -0.003859   0.118886  -0.032  0.97430   
## AspectS      0.075705   0.123780   0.612  0.54499   
## AspectSE    -0.050228   0.148740  -0.338  0.73773   
## AspectSW     0.053095   0.116440   0.456  0.65138   
## AspectW      0.034952   0.109105   0.320  0.75072   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1602 on 33 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2334, Adjusted R-squared:  0.02434 
## F-statistic: 1.116 on 9 and 33 DF,  p-value: 0.3789
summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp, data = Zmud_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp, data = Zmud_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.36270 -0.10855 -0.01459  0.07406  0.43903 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.36682    0.02394  15.320   <2e-16 ***
## SoilTemp     0.04742    0.02423   1.957   0.0572 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.157 on 41 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.08544,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.06314 
## F-statistic:  3.83 on 1 and 41 DF,  p-value: 0.05716
ggplot(aes(x = SoilTemp, y = Dissimilarity), data = Zmud_Diss)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

ggplot(aes(x = log(2+SoilMoist), y = Dissimilarity), data = Zmud_Diss)+

ggplot(aes(x = Slope, y = Dissimilarity), data = Zmud_Diss)+

  geom_point()

#### Combined

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp*X, data = Zmud_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp * X, data = Zmud_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.29434 -0.09002 -0.02199  0.05640  0.41752 
## 
## Coefficients:

## X            0.002198   0.001199   1.833   0.0745 .

## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1545 on 39 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1582, Adjusted R-squared:  0.09344 
## F-statistic: 2.443 on 3 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.07855
summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilMoist*X, data = Zmud_Diss))

## Multiple R-squared:  0.1089, Adjusted R-squared:  0.0404

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp*Y, data = Zmud_Diss))

## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp * Y, data = Zmud_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max

## 
## Coefficients:

## (Intercept)  0.4065707  0.0486121   8.364 3.12e-10 ***

## SoilTemp:Y   0.0002654  0.0004846   0.548    0.587    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1589 on 39 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.1094, Adjusted R-squared:  0.04089 
## F-statistic: 1.597 on 3 and 39 DF,  p-value: 0.2057
summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilMoist*Y, data = Zmud_Diss))

## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilMoist * Y, data = Zmud_Diss)

##

## Multiple R-squared:  0.1318, Adjusted R-squared:  0.06505

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilMoist*Z, data = Zmud_Diss))

Negligible effects

Zmud.mod.1<- lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X + Z, data = Zmud_Diss)
summary(Zmud.mod.1)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + 
##     X + Z, data = Zmud_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.32321 -0.11702 -0.01094  0.07883  0.34179 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)  0.2753405  0.1563741   1.761   0.0881 .
## SoilTemp     0.0444959  0.0298302   1.492   0.1459  
## SoilMoist   -0.0223662  0.0373333  -0.599   0.5535  
## Slope        0.0015574  0.0032906   0.473   0.6393  
## AspectN      0.1537082  0.1128200   1.362   0.1829  
## AspectNE     0.0104498  0.1231810   0.085   0.9329  
## AspectS      0.0678871  0.1274385   0.533   0.5980  
## AspectSE    -0.0325557  0.1536384  -0.212   0.8336  
## AspectSW     0.0721878  0.1209467   0.597   0.5549  
## AspectW      0.0557318  0.1164726   0.478   0.6357  
## X            0.0008466  0.0016386   0.517   0.6091  
## Z           -0.0080852  0.0173571  -0.466   0.6446  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1634 on 31 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2507, Adjusted R-squared:  -0.01522 
## F-statistic: 0.9428 on 11 and 31 DF,  p-value: 0.5148
Zmud.Null.1 <- lm(Dissimilarity ~ 1, data = Zmud_Diss)
anova(Zmud.mod.1, Zmud.Null.1)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Model 1: Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X + Z
## Model 2: Dissimilarity ~ 1
##   Res.Df     RSS  Df Sum of Sq      F Pr(>F)
## 1     31 0.82816                            
## 2     42 1.10521 -11  -0.27705 0.9428 0.5148
Zmud.cmp<- avg_comparisons(Zmud.mod.1,  variables =  list(SoilTemp = "minmax", SoilMoist = "minmax", Slope = "minmax", Aspect = "pairwise", X = "minmax", Z = "minmax"), conf_level = 0.90, type = "response")


Zmud.cmp<-Zmud.cmp %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  summarise_all(.funs = mean)
## Warning: There were 6 warnings in `summarise()`.
## The first warning was:
## ℹ In argument: `contrast = (new("standardGeneric", .Data = function (x, ...)
##   ...`.
## ℹ In group 1: `term = "Aspect"`.
## Caused by warning in `mean.default()`:
## ! argument is not numeric or logical: returning NA
## ℹ Run `dplyr::last_dplyr_warnings()` to see the 5 remaining warnings.
ggplot(Zmud.cmp, aes(x = estimate,
                 xmin = conf.low,
                 xmax = conf.high, 
                 y = term)) +
     annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1.5)+
  geom_errorbarh() + 
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic()

## Guadalupe-Nipomo

#I make unique identifiers for each plot
GuNi_Names<- colnames(GuNi_Cover)
GuNi_Names<-gsub('.{1}$', '', GuNi_Names)
GuNi_Names<-unique(gsub('GuNi.', '', GuNi_Names))
GuNi_Diss<-data.frame(Plot = rep("", length(GuNi_Names)), Dissimilarity= rep(0, length(GuNi_Names)))


for (i in 1:length(GuNi_Names)) {
  Temp_Cover<-GuNi_Cover %>% select(starts_with(paste0("GuNi.", GuNi_Names[i])))
  #Temp_Cover<- cbind(Temp_Cover[1], rowSums(Temp_Cover[2:5], na.rm = TRUE)/4)
  Temp_Diss<-vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE)
  Temp_Av_Dis<-sum(as.matrix(Temp_Diss)[,1])/4
  GuNi_Diss$Plot[i]<- GuNi_Names[i]
  GuNi_Diss$Dissimilarity[i]<- ifelse(is.na(Temp_Av_Dis) == TRUE, 0, ifelse(Temp_Av_Dis == "NaN", 0, Temp_Av_Dis))

}
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): missing values in results
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"

##                  meaningless in method "bray"

##                  meaningless in method "bray"

##                  meaningless in method "bray"

##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): missing values in results
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"

##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): missing values in results
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"

##                  meaningless in method "bray"

## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): you have empty rows: their dissimilarities may be
##                  meaningless in method "bray"

##                  meaningless in method "bray"
## Warning in vegdist(t(Temp_Cover), na.rm = TRUE): missing values in results
densityplot(GuNi_Diss$Dissimilarity)

GuNi_Diss$Plot<- as.numeric(GuNi_Diss$Plot)

GuNi_Diss<-merge(GuNi_Diss, GuNi_RelCords)

GuNi_Diss<-merge(GuNi_Diss, subset(DuneEnv_scaled, Site == "GuNi"))


GuNi_pcor<- GuNi_Diss %>%
  select(-c(Site, Plot, Aspect, Date, Collectors, dry_weight, Notes))%>%
  as.matrix()%>%
  cor.mtest(use =  "complete")


GuNi_Diss %>%
  select(-c(Site, Plot, Aspect, Date, Collectors, dry_weight, Notes))%>%
  as.matrix()%>%
  cor(use =  "complete")%>%
  corrplot( type = "upper", order = "hclust",  tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45, p.mat = GuNi_pcor$p)

Graphs and models

Distance

densityplot(GuNi_Diss$X)

densityplot(GuNi_Diss$Y)

densityplot(GuNi_Diss$Z)

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ X, data = GuNi_Diss)) # Distance from waterline not sig
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ X, data = GuNi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.41044 -0.28997 -0.01538  0.22324  0.56467 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.425305   0.091505   4.648 3.96e-05 ***
## X           -0.001666   0.001782  -0.935    0.356    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2755 on 38 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02247,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.003259 
## F-statistic: 0.8733 on 1 and 38 DF,  p-value: 0.3559
ggplot(aes(x = X, y = Dissimilarity), data = GuNi_Diss)+
  geom_point()+
  labs(x = "X-Coordinate", y = "Compositional Dissimilarity", title = "Guadalupe-Nipomo (South)")

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Y, data = GuNi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Y, data = GuNi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.35305 -0.34443  0.00253  0.20486  0.60504 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 3.437e-01  8.599e-02   3.997 0.000285 ***
## Y           7.634e-05  8.767e-04   0.087 0.931072    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2787 on 38 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.0001995,  Adjusted R-squared:  -0.02611 
## F-statistic: 0.007581 on 1 and 38 DF,  p-value: 0.9311
ggplot(aes(x = Y, y = Dissimilarity), data = GuNi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Z, data = GuNi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Z, data = GuNi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.42947 -0.26950 -0.01166  0.17519  0.64167 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)  0.26300    0.10740   2.449   0.0191 *
## Z            0.02323    0.02617   0.888   0.3804  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2758 on 38 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02031,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.005474 
## F-statistic: 0.7877 on 1 and 38 DF,  p-value: 0.3804
ggplot(aes(x = Z, y = Dissimilarity), data = GuNi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ X+Y+Z,  data = GuNi_Diss))

## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ X + Y + Z, data = GuNi_Diss)

Environmental

densityplot(GuNi_Diss$SoilTemp)

densityplot(GuNi_Diss$SoilMoist)

densityplot(GuNi_Diss$Slope)

densityplot(GuNi_Diss$pH)

densityplot(GuNi_Diss$cond_us.cm)

densityplot(GuNi_Diss$salinity_ppt)

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp+SoilMoist+Slope+Aspect+pH+salinity_ppt, data = GuNi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + 
##     pH + salinity_ppt, data = GuNi_Diss)

## SoilMoist     0.110414   0.051923   2.126   0.0428 *
## Slope         0.008185   0.004813   1.701   0.1005  
## AspectNE      0.073767   0.232469   0.317   0.7534  
## AspectNW      0.098057   0.208172   0.471   0.6414  
## AspectS       0.112880   0.140333   0.804   0.4282  
## AspectSE      0.327631   0.195168   1.679   0.1047  
## AspectSW      0.054148   0.148836   0.364   0.7188  
## AspectW      -0.107410   0.153068  -0.702   0.4889  
## pH           -0.014779   0.196270  -0.075   0.9405  
## salinity_ppt -0.193737   0.190547  -1.017   0.3183  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2637 on 27 degrees of freedom
##   (1 observation deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.3498, Adjusted R-squared:  0.08497 
## F-statistic: 1.321 on 11 and 27 DF,  p-value: 0.2664
summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp, data = GuNi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp, data = GuNi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.40716 -0.27034 -0.01336  0.20803  0.50637 
## 
## Coefficients:

## SoilTemp    -0.05855    0.04360  -1.343    0.187    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2723 on 38 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.0453, Adjusted R-squared:  0.02017 
## F-statistic: 1.803 on 1 and 38 DF,  p-value: 0.1873
ggplot(aes(x = SoilTemp, y = Dissimilarity), data = GuNi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilMoist, data = GuNi_Diss))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilMoist, data = GuNi_Diss)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.42150 -0.28991 -0.02983  0.16625  0.66371

## Multiple R-squared:  0.02675,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.001134 
## F-statistic: 1.044 on 1 and 38 DF,  p-value: 0.3133
ggplot(aes(x = SoilMoist, y = Dissimilarity), data = GuNi_Diss)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp*SoilMoist, data = GuNi_Diss))

  geom_point()

  geom_point()
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

Negligible effects

GuNi.mod.1<- lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X + Z + pH, data = subset(GuNi_Diss, is.na(pH) == FALSE))
summary(GuNi.mod.1)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + 
##     X + Z + pH, data = subset(GuNi_Diss, is.na(pH) == FALSE))
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.37592 -0.14293 -0.02795  0.14086  0.42223 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept) -1.085642   1.285948  -0.844    0.406
## SoilTemp    -0.014259   0.061869  -0.230    0.820
## SoilMoist    0.074680   0.051798   1.442    0.161
## Slope        0.006506   0.004948   1.315    0.200
## AspectNE     0.172607   0.230600   0.749    0.461
## AspectNW     0.119512   0.220173   0.543    0.592
## AspectS      0.038897   0.146521   0.265    0.793
## AspectSE     0.121380   0.212616   0.571    0.573
## AspectSW    -0.079264   0.162174  -0.489    0.629
## AspectW     -0.222775   0.166855  -1.335    0.193
## X           -0.003959   0.003061  -1.293    0.207
## Z            0.035268   0.035845   0.984    0.334
## pH           0.161223   0.152044   1.060    0.299
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2651 on 26 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.3673, Adjusted R-squared:  0.07521 
## F-statistic: 1.258 on 12 and 26 DF,  p-value: 0.2998
GuNi.Null.1 <- lm(Dissimilarity ~ 1, data = subset(GuNi_Diss, is.na(pH) == FALSE))
anova(GuNi.mod.1, GuNi.Null.1)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Model 1: Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X + Z + 
##     pH
## Model 2: Dissimilarity ~ 1
##   Res.Df    RSS  Df Sum of Sq      F Pr(>F)
## 1     26 1.8275                            
## 2     38 2.8882 -12   -1.0607 1.2575 0.2998
GuNi.pre.1<- predictions(GuNi.mod.1)

GuNi.cmp<- avg_comparisons(GuNi.mod.1,  variables =  list(SoilTemp = "minmax", SoilMoist = "minmax", Slope = "minmax", Aspect = "pairwise", X = "minmax", Z = "minmax", pH = "minmax"), conf_level = 0.90, type = "response")


GuNi.cmp<-GuNi.cmp %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  summarise_all(.funs = mean)
## Warning: There were 7 warnings in `summarise()`.
## The first warning was:
## ℹ In argument: `contrast = (new("standardGeneric", .Data = function (x, ...)
##   ...`.
## ℹ In group 1: `term = "Aspect"`.
## Caused by warning in `mean.default()`:
## ! argument is not numeric or logical: returning NA
## ℹ Run `dplyr::last_dplyr_warnings()` to see the 6 remaining warnings.
ggplot(GuNi.cmp, aes(x = estimate,
                 xmin = conf.low,
                 xmax = conf.high, 
                 y = term)) +
     annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1.5)+
  geom_errorbarh() + 
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic()

Mixed

Comb_Dis<-rbind(TeMi_Diss, Zmud_Diss, GuNi_Diss)

Comb_pcor<- Comb_Dis %>%
  select(-c(Site, Plot, Aspect, Date, Collectors, dry_weight, Notes))%>%
  as.matrix()%>%
  cor.mtest(use =  "complete")


Comb_Dis %>%
  select(-c(Site, Plot, Aspect, Date, Collectors, dry_weight, Notes))%>%
  as.matrix()%>%
  cor(use =  "complete")%>%
  corrplot( type = "upper", order = "hclust",  tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45, p.mat = GuNi_pcor$p, diag = FALSE)

densityplot(Comb_Dis$Dissimilarity)

densityplot(subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity >0)$Dissimilarity)

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ X, data = Comb_Dis)) # Distance from waterline not sig
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ X, data = Comb_Dis)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.41530 -0.13080  0.00722  0.15282  0.57889 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.3788594  0.0450447   8.411 9.89e-14 ***
## X           0.0004462  0.0009386   0.475    0.635    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2279 on 120 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.00188,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.006438 
## F-statistic: 0.226 on 1 and 120 DF,  p-value: 0.6354
ggplot(aes(x = X, y = Dissimilarity), data = Comb_Dis)+
  geom_point()+
  labs(x = "X-Coordinate", y = "Compositional Dissimilarity", title = "Guadalupe-Nipomo (South)")

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Y, data = Comb_Dis))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Y, data = Comb_Dis)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.41155 -0.13251  0.00509  0.15344  0.59137 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.4117684  0.0401077  10.267   <2e-16 ***
## Y           -0.0001717  0.0004257  -0.403    0.687    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2279 on 120 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.001354,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.006968 
## F-statistic: 0.1627 on 1 and 120 DF,  p-value: 0.6874
ggplot(aes(x = Y, y = Dissimilarity), data = Comb_Dis)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Z, data = Comb_Dis))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Z, data = Comb_Dis)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.39937 -0.13071  0.00435  0.15548  0.59116 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.3965541  0.0486737   8.147 4.04e-13 ***
## Z           0.0003933  0.0129198   0.030    0.976    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2281 on 120 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  7.722e-06,  Adjusted R-squared:  -0.008326 
## F-statistic: 0.0009266 on 1 and 120 DF,  p-value: 0.9758
ggplot(aes(x = Z, y = Dissimilarity), data = Comb_Dis)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ X+Y+Z,  data = Comb_Dis))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ X + Y + Z, data = Comb_Dis)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.42111 -0.12966  0.00747  0.15092  0.57887 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)  0.3951627  0.0696989   5.670 1.03e-07 ***
## X            0.0004479  0.0009601   0.467    0.642    
## Y           -0.0001680  0.0004292  -0.391    0.696    
## Z           -0.0008227  0.0132063  -0.062    0.950    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2296 on 118 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.003195,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.02215 
## F-statistic: 0.1261 on 3 and 118 DF,  p-value: 0.9445
summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp+SoilMoist+Slope+Aspect+pH+salinity_ppt, data = Comb_Dis))

## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + 
##     pH + salinity_ppt, data = Comb_Dis)

##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.48073 -0.10194 -0.01187  0.16941  0.57506 
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)   0.677326   1.062319   0.638   0.5260  
## SoilTemp      0.001262   0.031186   0.040   0.9678  
## SoilMoist     0.068672   0.033323   2.061   0.0433 *
## Slope         0.004704   0.003292   1.429   0.1578  
## AspectN       0.051532   0.129092   0.399   0.6911  
## AspectNE      0.089855   0.145730   0.617   0.5397  
## AspectNW      0.075717   0.172209   0.440   0.6616  
## AspectS       0.060224   0.132487   0.455   0.6509  
## AspectSE      0.227947   0.151545   1.504   0.1374  
## AspectSW      0.091828   0.143077   0.642   0.5233  
## AspectW      -0.058450   0.139659  -0.419   0.6769

## salinity_ppt -0.299929   0.146806  -2.043   0.0451 *
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.248 on 65 degrees of freedom
##   (44 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.2067, Adjusted R-squared:  0.0603 
## F-statistic: 1.412 on 12 and 65 DF,  p-value: 0.1835
summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp, data = Comb_Dis))

## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp, data = Comb_Dis)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max

## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

## Multiple R-squared:  0.002877,   Adjusted R-squared:  -0.005432

  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ Aspect, data = Comb_Dis))

## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ Aspect, data = Comb_Dis)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max

## Coefficients:

## AspectNE     0.017931   0.100826   0.178    0.859    
## AspectNW     0.006533   0.139312   0.047    0.963    
## AspectS      0.039052   0.095881   0.407    0.685    
## AspectSE     0.088399   0.110543   0.800    0.426

## ---

## Multiple R-squared:  0.05494,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.003086

ggplot(aes(x = Aspect, y = Dissimilarity), data = Comb_Dis)+
  geom_point()

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ pH, data = Comb_Dis))
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ pH, data = Comb_Dis)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.47145 -0.12432 -0.00122  0.16683  0.52665

## Coefficients:

## pH           0.10234    0.06267   1.633    0.107
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2531 on 76 degrees of freedom
##   (44 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.0339, Adjusted R-squared:  0.02119 
## F-statistic: 2.667 on 1 and 76 DF,  p-value: 0.1066
ggplot(aes(x = pH, y = Dissimilarity), data = Comb_Dis)+
  geom_point()
## Warning: Removed 44 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ cond_us.cm, data = Comb_Dis))

## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ cond_us.cm, data = Comb_Dis)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.48378 -0.11661  0.00629  0.15580  0.49192 
## 
## Coefficients:

## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2485 on 76 degrees of freedom
##   (44 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.06882,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.05657 
## F-statistic: 5.617 on 1 and 76 DF,  p-value: 0.02033
ggplot(aes(x = cond_us.cm, y = Dissimilarity), data = Comb_Dis)+

## (`geom_point()`).

summary(lm(Dissimilarity ~ salinity_ppt, data = Comb_Dis)) #***
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = Dissimilarity ~ salinity_ppt, data = Comb_Dis)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.47278 -0.11692  0.00562  0.15649  0.49641 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   0.50278    0.04918  10.224 6.26e-16 ***
## salinity_ppt -0.18068    0.08054  -2.243   0.0278 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2494 on 76 degrees of freedom
##   (44 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.0621, Adjusted R-squared:  0.04976 
## F-statistic: 5.032 on 1 and 76 DF,  p-value: 0.02779
ggplot(aes(x = salinity_ppt, y = Dissimilarity), data = Comb_Dis)+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## Warning: Removed 44 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).
## Removed 44 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

Negligible Effects

Mixed.mod.1 <- lmer(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect +  X +  Z  + (1|Site), data = subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity >0.0))
summary(Mixed.mod.1)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML ['lmerMod']
## Formula: Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X + Z +  
##     (1 | Site)
##    Data: subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity > 0)
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: -12.7
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -2.0790 -0.6293 -0.1038  0.5131  3.1597 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Site     (Intercept) 0.005482 0.07404 
##  Residual             0.027736 0.16654 
## Number of obs: 107, groups:  Site, 3
## 
## Fixed effects:
##               Estimate Std. Error t value
## (Intercept)  0.3951190  0.1046243   3.777
## SoilTemp     0.0573273  0.0180195   3.181
## SoilMoist    0.0086430  0.0189710   0.456
## Slope        0.0010563  0.0018899   0.559
## AspectN      0.0221338  0.0726586   0.305
## AspectNE    -0.0067168  0.0795584  -0.084
## AspectNW    -0.0549615  0.1078929  -0.509
## AspectS      0.0706362  0.0773286   0.913
## AspectSE     0.0840467  0.0882713   0.952
## AspectSW     0.0680103  0.0804657   0.845
## AspectW      0.0075406  0.0775801   0.097
## X            0.0011937  0.0008982   1.329
## Z           -0.0074262  0.0111288  -0.667
## 
## Correlation matrix not shown by default, as p = 13 > 12.
## Use print(x, correlation=TRUE)  or
##     vcov(x)        if you need it
Mixed.Null.1 <- lmer(Dissimilarity ~ 1  + (1|Site), data = subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity >0.0))
Mixed.ST<- lmer(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp  + (1|Site), data = subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity >0.0))
Mixed.X<- lmer(Dissimilarity ~ X  + (1|Site), data = subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity >0.0))

anova(Mixed.mod.1, Mixed.Null.1)
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## Data: subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity > 0)
## Models:
## Mixed.Null.1: Dissimilarity ~ 1 + (1 | Site)
## Mixed.mod.1: Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X + Z + (1 | Site)
##              npar     AIC     BIC logLik -2*log(L)  Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)  
## Mixed.Null.1    3 -62.006 -53.987 34.003   -68.006                       
## Mixed.mod.1    15 -57.711 -17.619 43.855   -87.711 19.705 12    0.07288 .
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
anova(Mixed.ST, Mixed.Null.1)
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## Data: subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity > 0)
## Models:
## Mixed.Null.1: Dissimilarity ~ 1 + (1 | Site)
## Mixed.ST: Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + (1 | Site)
##              npar     AIC     BIC logLik -2*log(L)  Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Mixed.Null.1    3 -62.006 -53.987 34.003   -68.006                         
## Mixed.ST        4 -72.459 -61.767 40.229   -80.459 12.453  1  0.0004174 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
anova(Mixed.X, Mixed.Null.1)
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## Data: subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity > 0)
## Models:
## Mixed.Null.1: Dissimilarity ~ 1 + (1 | Site)
## Mixed.X: Dissimilarity ~ X + (1 | Site)
##              npar     AIC     BIC logLik -2*log(L) Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## Mixed.Null.1    3 -62.006 -53.987 34.003   -68.006                    
## Mixed.X         4 -61.416 -50.725 34.708   -69.416  1.41  1     0.2351
anova(Mixed.ST, Mixed.X)
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## Data: subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity > 0)
## Models:
## Mixed.ST: Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + (1 | Site)
## Mixed.X: Dissimilarity ~ X + (1 | Site)
##          npar     AIC     BIC logLik -2*log(L) Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## Mixed.ST    4 -72.459 -61.767 40.229   -80.459                    
## Mixed.X     4 -61.416 -50.725 34.708   -69.416     0  0
Mixed.cmp<- avg_comparisons(Mixed.mod.1, variables = list(SoilTemp = "minmax", SoilMoist = "minmax", Slope = "minmax", Aspect = "pairwise", X = "minmax", Z = "minmax"),   conf_level = 0.90, type = "response")
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.
Mixed.cmp <- as.data.frame(Mixed.cmp)


for(j in 1:dim(Mixed.cmp)[1]){
  if(Mixed.cmp$term[j] == "Aspect"){
    if(Mixed.cmp$estimate[j] <= 0){
   Mixed.cmp$estimate[j] <- (Mixed.cmp$estimate[j] * -1)
   NewLow <- (Mixed.cmp$conf.high[j] * -1)
   Mixed.cmp$conf.high[j] <- (Mixed.cmp$conf.low[j] * -1)
   Mixed.cmp$conf.low[j] <- NewLow
  } 
}
}



ggplot(Mixed.cmp, aes(x = estimate,
                 xmin = conf.low,
                 xmax = conf.high, 
                 y = term,
                 group = contrast)) +
     annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1.5)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low,  xmax = conf.high,),position = position_dodgev(height = 1.5)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodgev(height = 1.5)) +
  theme_classic()
## Warning: position_dodgev requires non-overlapping y intervals

Mixed.cmp<-Mixed.cmp %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  summarise_all(.funs = mean)
## Warning: There were 6 warnings in `summarise()`.
## The first warning was:
## ℹ In argument: `contrast = (new("standardGeneric", .Data = function (x, ...)
##   ...`.
## ℹ In group 1: `term = "Aspect"`.
## Caused by warning in `mean.default()`:
## ! argument is not numeric or logical: returning NA
## ℹ Run `dplyr::last_dplyr_warnings()` to see the 5 remaining warnings.
ggplot(Mixed.cmp, aes(x = estimate,
                 xmin = conf.low,
                 xmax = conf.high, 
                 y = term,
                 group = contrast)) +
     annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1.5)+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low,  xmax = conf.high,),position = position_dodgev(height = 1.5)) + 
  geom_point(size = 4, position = position_dodgev(height = 1.5)) +
  theme_classic()+
  labs(x = "Estimated Change in Community Dissimilarity", y = "Term")+
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 18))
## Warning: position_dodgev requires non-overlapping y intervals

ggsave("Within-Marginal.png", dpi = 600, height = 7, width = 10)
## Warning: position_dodgev requires non-overlapping y intervals
plot_predictions(Mixed.mod.1, condition = "SoilTemp")+
  geom_point(data = subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity >0), size = 3,aes(x = SoilTemp, y = Dissimilarity, color = Site, shape = Site))+
  labs(x = "Soil Temperature (°C)", y =  "Community Dissimilarity")+
  scale_color_manual(labels = c("Guadalupe-Nipomo", "Ten Mile", "Zmudowski"), values = c("#d55e00", "#cc79a7", "#009e73"), name = "Site")+
  scale_shape_manual(labels = c("Guadalupe-Nipomo", "Ten Mile", "Zmudowski"), values = c(1,2,0), name = "Site")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 18))
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.
## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the
## uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when
## `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default)
## or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence
## this warning.

  #geom_smooth(data = subset(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity >0), aes(x = SoilTemp, y = Dissimilarity), method = "lm")

ggsave("Within-SoilTemp.png", dpi = 600, height = 7, width = 10)

Randomization Test

Tracker<- data.frame()
SingleTrack<-0

for (i in 1:100) {
  
  Rand.1<- transform(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity = sample(Dissimilarity) )
  Rand.mod.1 <- lmer(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X +  Z  + (1|Site), data = subset(Rand.1, Dissimilarity >0))
  
  
  while(isSingular(Rand.mod.1) == TRUE){
    SingleTrack <- SingleTrack + 1
   Rand.1<- transform(Comb_Dis, Dissimilarity = sample(Dissimilarity) )
  Rand.mod.1 <- lmer(Dissimilarity ~ SoilTemp + SoilMoist + Slope + Aspect + X +  Z  + (1|Site), data = subset(Rand.1, Dissimilarity >0))
    } 
  
    Rand.cmp<- avg_comparisons(Rand.mod.1, variables = list(SoilTemp = "minmax", SoilMoist = "minmax", Slope = "minmax", Aspect = "pairwise", X = "minmax", Z = "minmax"),   conf_level = 0.90, type = "response")
      
  for(j in 1:dim(Rand.cmp)[1]){
  if(Rand.cmp$term[j] == "Aspect"){
    if(Rand.cmp$estimate[j] <= 0){
   Rand.cmp$estimate[j] <- (Rand.cmp$estimate[j] * -1)
   NewLow <- (Rand.cmp$conf.high[j] * -1)
   Rand.cmp$conf.high[j] <- (Rand.cmp$conf.low[j] * -1)
   Rand.cmp$conf.low[j] <- NewLow
  } 
}
}
  
  Rand.cmp<-Rand.cmp %>%
    group_by(term) %>%
    summarise_all(.funs = mean)

   Run <- rep(i, dim(Rand.cmp)[1])
    Rand.cmp<- cbind(Rand.cmp, Run)

    
    
    Tracker <- rbind(Tracker, Rand.cmp)
    print(i)
    
  
}

This is often appropriate when `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default) or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence this warning.

## Warning: For this model type, `marginaleffects` only takes into account the uncertainty in fixed-effect parameters. This is often appropriate when `re.form=NA`, but may be surprising to users who set `re.form=NULL` (default) or to some other value. Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence this warning.

Call `options(marginaleffects_safe = FALSE)` to silence this warning.

## [1] 100
    # ggplot(Tracker, aes(x = estimate,
    #                xmin = conf.low,
    #                xmax = conf.high,
    #                y = term,
    #                group = contrast)) +
    #   annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
    #   geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed") +
    #   geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1.5)+
    #   geom_errorbarh(position = position_dodgev(height = 1.5)) +
    #   geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodgev(height = 1.5)) +
    #   theme_classic()
    
ggplot(Tracker, aes(x = estimate, 
                    y = term, 
                    group = term))+
  geom_density_ridges(fill = "blue", alpha = 0.75)+
      annotate("rect", xmin = -0.1, xmax = 0.1, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, alpha = .2)+
      geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.1, .1), linetype = "dashed")
## Picking joint bandwidth of 0.0283

length(unique(Tracker$Run))
## [1] 100
Tracker %>% group_by(term) %>% summarize_all(mean)
## # A tibble: 6 × 10
##   term  contrast estimate std.error statistic p.value s.value conf.low conf.high
##   <chr>    <dbl>    <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl>   <dbl>   <dbl>    <dbl>     <dbl>
## 1 Aspe…       NA  6.71e-2    0.0858   0.0182    0.505    1.42  -0.0740     0.208
## 2 Slope       NA -3.29e-4    0.0857  -0.00205   0.488    1.49  -0.141      0.141
## 3 Soil…       NA -1.90e-2    0.120   -0.154     0.531    1.33  -0.216      0.178
## 4 Soil…       NA -7.50e-3    0.104   -0.0705    0.555    1.26  -0.178      0.163
## 5 X           NA -3.75e-4    0.0825  -0.00688   0.499    1.44  -0.136      0.135
## 6 Z           NA -7.04e-3    0.0847  -0.0806    0.495    1.45  -0.146      0.132
## # ℹ 1 more variable: Run <dbl>
save.image(file="DuneComm2.RData")
